use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and key user actions
Destructive action buttons with confirmation states
Secondary navigation and contextual action triggers
Icon-only buttons for compact UI toolbars
Link-style buttons for inline navigation within content
ai_summary: A reusable Button component with multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options, built with Radix UI Slot for flexible composition and class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management. Supports disabled states, focus rings, and asChild pattern for rendering as different elements. Part of the shadcn/ui design system.
